title: Call Me
why_this_song: Call Me by Blondie (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 41 times; first heard in: "Call me (call me) on the line"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Color me your color, baby"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Call me, call me any, anytime"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I know who you are"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Call me (call me) on the line"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

excerpts.text: Call me (call me) for a ride

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Call Me" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Call Me" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Call Me" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Call Me"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Blondie one question about "Call Me", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Blondie sobre "Call Me", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
